description: A subterranean farm under artificial sunlamps. Orderly rows of glowing root vegetables stretch out into the shadows.

exit_west.description: A small mud trail leading back to the Apple Swamp.

farm_fence.description: Tall wooden fences and support beams keeping the mountain from collapsing.

tilled_soil.description: Tilled soil that is warm and soft to step on.

rotten_produce.description: A heap of decaying agricultural waste. It smells strongly of mold.

suitable_potato.description: A highly prized, perfectly healthy subterranean potato growing in a special plot.

item.name: Suitable Potato
item.description: A rare, non-rotten potato from the Great Farm. It looks almost too perfect.
item.opened_description: The special plot has been harvested.

onUse.successMessage: You harvested a Suitable Potato! It's solid, clean, and highly nutritious.

exit_east.description: A tunnel exit that leads back up towards the surface bridge.
